description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a sprawling, L-shaped footprint set on a rectangular grassy plot. The exterior features dark brown wooden siding, complemented by a dark gray, multi-gabled roof with visible chimneys. Large blue-tinted windows are distributed asymmetrically along the facades, providing ample natural light to the interior. A prominent covered entryway connects the main living area to a detached garage structure via a short breezeway. The rooflines are varied, with both gable and hip elements, and the overall design emphasizes horizontal lines and integration with the landscape. The building appears to have a modest porch area and is surrounded by open green space.
description: A single-story, L-shaped bungalow with dark brown wooden siding, a multi-gabled dark gray roof, and large blue-tinted windows, set on a grassy plot with a detached garage.
description_view_0: This view shows the main facade with several large windows, the entryway, and the connection to the detached garage.
description_view_1: From this angle, the detached garage is most prominent, with the main house partially visible behind it.
description_view_2: This side view highlights the long stretch of the bungalow, the breezeway, and the rear windows, with the garage to the left.
description_view_3: The rear of the bungalow is visible here, showing more windows and the back side of the main living area.
